decoder.notes: L1+L2+L3 COMPLETE: all 13 bindable of 16 functions bound. init_file/init_memory/init_file_default (native-format-preserving default config, exercises config_init_default + config_init_copy)/init_file_vfs (NULL-VFS default-stdio path), read/seek, length/cursor/available-frames queries, data-format accessors, uninit. 18 binding + 14 API tests (native-format preservation, VFS==file equivalence, available==length-cursor invariant). 3 excluded: ma_decoder_init (custom read/seek callback ctor), init_file_w/init_vfs_w (Windows wchar variants).

encoder.notes: L1+L2+L3 COMPLETE: all 5 bindable of 10 functions bound. WAV output: config_init/init_file/init_file_vfs (NULL-VFS default-stdio path)/write/uninit. 11 binding + 7 API tests (round-trip via Decoder, VFS round-trip). 5 excluded: ma_encoder_init (custom write/seek callback ctor), init__internal/preinit (internal pre-init helpers), init_file_w/init_vfs_w (Windows wchar variants).

device.notes: L1+L2+L3 COMPLETE: all 24 bindable of 25 functions bound. Playback lifecycle (init/init_ex/start/stop/uninit), shim-owned data callback pulls f32 from a Decoder on the null backend, plus offline pump via handle_backend_data_callback. State (get_state/is_started), master volume (linear + dB get/set), device name, device info snapshot (get_info + is_default + native-data-format list + add_native_data_format), id_equal, context backend + log presence. Job-thread family (config_init/init/uninit/post/next via a DeviceJobThread RAII type; no_thread + NON_BLOCKING for determinism). 35 binding + 11 API tests. 1 excluded: ma_device_post_init (custom-backend authoring hook; 'Unsafe', needs a backend-negotiated ma_device_descriptor). (Generic Mojo data callback not possible: function values don't conform to AnyType in DLHandle.call.)

engine.notes: L1+L2+L3 COMPLETE: all 32 bindable of 44 functions bound. Lifecycle/start/stop, play_sound + play_sound_ex, volume/gain/sample-rate/channels, read_pcm_frames (offline node-graph read), global clock (get/set time in pcm-frames + milliseconds), and full index-based listener spatialization (count/find_closest, position/direction/velocity/world_up, cone, enabled). 10 binding + 8 API tests on the null backend. 12 excluded: get_time/set_time (deprecated, superseded by _in_pcm_frames variants), get_device/get_node_graph/get_endpoint/get_log/get_resource_manager (raw non-owning handles to owned/unmodeled families), and the 5 ma_engine_node_* (node-graph node subtype needs the node family).

sound.notes: L1+L2+L3 COMPLETE: all 75 bindable of 84 functions bound. Full control (start/stop/volume/pan/pitch/looping), spatialization (position/direction/velocity/attenuation/positioning/rolloff/gains/distances/cone/doppler/pan-mode/listener), fade + start/stop-time scheduling, seconds-based seek/cursor/length, data_format, init_copy. 12 binding + 9 API tests. 9 excluded: config-struct ctors (config_init/config_init_2/init_ex/init_from_file_internal), data_source-dependent (init_from_data_source/get_data_source), get_engine (raw non-owning ptr), set_end_callback (fn-ptr; at_end() poll is the stand-in), _w path variant.

sound_group.notes: L1+L2+L3 COMPLETE: all 53 bindable of 57 functions bound. Full control (start/stop/volume/pan/pitch), spatialization (position/direction/velocity/attenuation/positioning/rolloff/gains/distances/cone/doppler/pan-mode/listener), fade (set_fade_in_pcm_frames/milliseconds + get_current_fade_volume), start/stop-time scheduling. 10 binding + 7 API tests. 4 excluded: config-struct ctors (config_init/config_init_2/init_ex), get_engine (raw non-owning ptr, mirrors sound's exclusion).

waveform.notes: L1+L2+L3 COMPLETE: all 9 MA_API functions bound (config_init/init/uninit/read_pcm_frames/seek_to_pcm_frame/set_amplitude/set_frequency/set_type/set_sample_rate). 8 binding tests + 7 API tests (silence, amplitude change, seek-restart, stereo).

noise.notes: L1+L2+L3 COMPLETE: all 6 bindable of 9 functions bound (config_init+init/uninit/read_pcm_frames/set_amplitude/set_seed). set_type excluded (deprecated, asserts false in miniaudio). get_heap_size/init_preallocated excluded (internal allocator helpers). 8 binding tests + 7 API tests (white/pink/brownian, amplitude change, stereo).
